title: 08983_Evaluation_of_LLMs_on_Syntax-Aware_Code_Fill-in-the-Middle_Tasks
positive_examples: Enhances the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) in code generation tasks.
negative_examples: Automated code production’s security and privacy concerns.
Risk of improved code generation capabilities being exploited for malicious purposes, such as creating software vulnerabilities or harmful software.
